title: 06-30-2009 AFR - Statistical Section
first_page_excerpt:
DESCRIPTION OF STATISTICAL SECTION CONTENTS 
 
June 30, 2009 
 
 
This part of the City of Oceanside’s comprehensive annual financial report presents detailed 
information as a context for understanding what the information in the financial statements, note 
disclosures, and required supplementary information say about the City’s overall financial health. 
 
Contents:  
 
 
 
Financial Trends theses schedules contain trend information to help the reader understand how the 
City’s financial performance and well-being have changed over time. 
 
Revenue Capacity these schedules contain information to help the reader assess the City’s most 
significant local revenue source, the property tax.
